attacking_style: Opportunistic solo accelerations from breakaways when elite climbers neutralize each other. Willing to commit fully despite domestique role, attacks in final kilometers on summit finishes.
team_tactics: Given freedom to pursue breakaway opportunities even from domestique position, minimal dedicated team setup required for opportunistic moves.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes where tactical racing among favorites creates windows; strong enough on climbs to contend with GC-caliber riders when they mark each other.
vulnerability: Insufficient observations to determine consistent vulnerability patterns. Single observation shows ability to compete but not finish against elite climbers.
key_patterns: Seizes solo opportunities when GC favorites stall in tactical stalemates
Operates effectively from domestique role with autonomy for personal ambitions
Can sustain efforts to final meters on summit finishes, competitive within 200m
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated ability to nearly defeat elite GC climbers from breakaway, showing strong climbing form and tactical awareness
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18
